examples: This phraseology is intended to appeal to various sides of the conflict.
He had unconsciously dropped back into the phraseology of the first days of his compulsory greatness.
A speaker who USES that kind of phraseology has gone some distance toward turning himself into a machine.
The report looks at some of the phraseology involved in constitutional debate.
We hide the allocation of scarce resources behind phraseology such as "quality adjusted life years, " but at the end of the day, it is allocation.
